title: Contract provisions
doc_html:
§603.  Contract provisions

All such contracts of insurance shall contain a clause whereby the insurance companies issuing said insurance shall not assert as a defense to any suit against them, the governmental immunity of such school board, levee board or other public body.

Acts 1950, No. 35, §3.
